chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constitution Petition No.D-1414 of 2025 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on o/objections. 2. For hearing of CMA No.5448/2025 (S/A) 3. For hearing of main case. 13.10.2025 Mr. Aftab Hussain Bhutto, Advocate for the petitioners. Mr. Muhammad Tarique Panhwar, Advocate for the respondent No.6. Mr. Agha Athar Hussain, Assistant Advocate General. Mr. Gulzar Ali Malano, Assistant Prosecutor General along with I.O/ Inspector Ghulam Mustafa..-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- The investigation officer is present in Court and submits that he has recorded the statement of petitioner No.1 under section 161 Cr.P.C, and her video has also been recorded by him, wherein she has not supported contents of FIR and has stated that she was not abducted and that she contracted marriage of her own free will with petitioner No.2. He further submits that, in view of the said statement, the case is liable to be disposed of under “C” class. Mr. Muhammad Tarique Panhwar objected the petition. After such a statement, learned counsel for the petitioners seeks disposal of the instant petition. Accordingly, instant constitution petition, stands disposed of with directions to the I.O to submit the report, as suggested by him, before the concerned Magistrate within seven days. In the meantime, official respondents are directed to provide legal protection to the petitioners in accordance with law. In view of the above, petition is disposed of. JUDGE JUDGE S.Nawaz(St)’
